name: Calamari Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 large can of plum tomatoes, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the squid: Separate the tentacles from the sac, removing any bones and squeezing out the beak. Wash the sac thoroughly, remove any translucent bone, peel off the outer skin if present, and cut into rings. The tentacles can remain whole or be cut in half.
2. Prepare the sauce: Add the crushed tomatoes, parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper to a saucepan. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Cook the squid: In a frying pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic cloves and lightly brown them. Add the squid tentacles and cook until they change color, about 10 minutes. Stir in the dry sherry and pour it into the tomato sauce. Simmer gently for another 15 minutes.
4. Serve: Cook your favorite pasta and serve with the prepared calamari sauce.
